name: qwen3_5_2b_performance_suite
description: Standard performance baseline suite for Qwen/Qwen3.5-2B on vLLM. Measures offline throughput across input/output length combinations, with optional prefix caching A/B comparison.
notes: The scan_config is resolved relative to this suite config's directory.
Each scan point runs vllm bench throughput independently.
GPU memory and KV cache stats are captured from engine logs.
For online serving metrics (TTFT/TPOT/ITL), use vllm bench serve on bare-metal Linux.
